summary: Upgraded flutter-extractor.py to v0.1.2 and updated flutter-accuracy-validator.py. Drift dropped from 159 → 79 (target: <80). Four extractor bugs fixed; validator scope narrowed to exclude non-social-SDK docs.
investigation_AmityPostRepository: Case (b): The Flutter SDK uses PostRepository and UserRepository (without Amity prefix). The barrel exports them from lib/src/public/repo/ as PostRepository/UserRepository/CommentRepository/etc. Docs using AmityPostRepository and AmityUserRepository are real NAME DRIFT — 14+4=18 drift items remain.

changes.description: Bumped EXTRACTOR_VERSION to '0.1.2'. Fixed four bugs: (1) Single-line enum extraction — Dart enums declared entirely on one line (enum Foo { A, B, C }) had brace_depth net to 0 before member detection ran; fix extracts values inline during enum declaration if { and } appear on same line. (2) Multi-line enum terminator — changed from checking `line == ';'` to `';' in line` to catch enum value sections that end with `lastValue;` on the same line. (3) old_depth for member detection — changed `brace_depth == entry_depth+1` to `old_depth == entry_depth+1` so methods that open their body on the same declaration line (e.g. `void foo() {`) are captured. This resolved ~20 previously-missing AmityCoreClient methods. (4) Untyped static const — added STATIC_CONST_UNTYPED_RE for `static const name = ...` (no type annotation), capturing SessionState.Established, AmityRegionalHttpEndpoint.SG, etc. Added enum_values_total stat (222 values).

Added EXCLUDED_PREFIXES exclusion list for doc paths that document OTHER Flutter SDK packages — uikit/ (Flutter UIKit SDK) and social-plus-sdk/video-new/ (Flutter Live Streaming SDK). These paths contain Flutter UIKit and Video SDK APIs that are legitimately not in the Flutter social SDK surface and would always generate false drift. Excluding them reduces noise by 34 issues.

Regenerated. Stats: 325 types, 0 mixins, 1549 members (was 650), 222 enum_values. Key: AmityCommentReferenceType now has POST/CONTENT/STORY; AmityPostTargetType has USER/COMMUNITY; AmityAdPlacement has FEED/STORY/COMMENT/CHAT/CHATLIST; AmityCoreClient now has 22 methods (was 4); SessionState has Established/NotLoggedIn/Establishing/TokenExpired; AmityRegionalHttpEndpoint has SG/EU/US.

Regenerated. total_issues: 79 (was 159). 21 files with issues (was 41). Remaining 79 issues are real documentation drift: AmityPostRepository (should be PostRepository) ×14, AmityCommentReferenceType.post (should be POST) ×8, AmityCoreClient.newClient (doesn't exist) ×6, AmityUserRepository (should be UserRepository) ×4, fabricated types (AmityCommentCreationData, AmityCommentQuery, AmityCommentUpdateData) ×8, etc.

notes: AmityPostRepository (×14) and AmityUserRepository (×4) are case (b) in the investigation — the SDK uses PostRepository/UserRepository (no Amity prefix), docs use wrong names. AmityCommentReferenceType.post (×8) is case-mismatch drift (SDK has POST uppercase). Remaining top items are all fabricated API patterns not in the Flutter social SDK.
